title: Design Layout Worksheet
text: Design Layout Worksheet The Design Layout Worksheet enables you to create the layout of the component, and bind individual elements to objects in the component structure. For Dynamic and Static Server Pages components, Uniface inserts the basic HTML and references to JavaScript and styles required to generate a valid HTML page. To complete the layout, you need to insert HTML elements that are bound to the component structure, and add your own page design elements to control the page appearance. Tools Resource Browser—lists objects in the component structure and code snippets that you can insert into the layout. Layout Editor—HTML source editor for editing the layout. How to Insert Uniface Objects in the Server Page Layout Using the Uniface IDE Working with Development Objects Related Links Layout A layout defines the way data is arranged, formatted, and styled for presentation to the user, either on screen or in print. Binding Web Layout to Component Structure Binding refers to the way in which layout elements are connected to data structures and triggers in the component structure. It ensures that data is displayed by the appropriate HTML elements in the web page, and that the correct trigger is executed when data in a field is changed. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
